implemented: atomic host-owned capsule store with SHA-256 integrity
trajectory local capture from Agent CLI Mirror JSONL
local utility benchmark framework (coverage, drift, warnings, abstention)
session filtering by minimum prefix and session ID
finding: The plugin can capture and benchmark against real Agent CLI Mirror sessions. The atomic capsule store provides host-owned durable state with integrity verification. Local utility measurement is now possible without external dependencies.
decision: Promote atomic capsule store and local utility benchmark. Next: run independent host trials.
non_claim_lock: Local utility benchmark measures offline behavior on captured sessions. It does not establish live agent utility, production readiness, or autonomous authority.
